title: Foggy Border
description: A more immersive Worldborder, which uses Fog instead of blue lines :)
body:
# Foggy Border This Mod will replace the worldborder with Fog. Instead of weird blue lines you will feel the fog creepin in on you... Getting closer and closer as you try to leave the confinense of the world. This Mod does **not** change how to worldborder behaves it just changes the way it is shown. ![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1SzND5KW/images/1c12956fedd4c35e9ebf4467978a09ad86dbf251.png) ## Shaders Compatibility Shaders compatibility can be complicated. While some shaders seamlessly work with Foggy Border Enhancement, others may not. You should just try to find out. ## Mod Compatibility Foggy Border Enhancement works seamlessly with Fog Looks Good Now.
Foggy Border is designed to be compatible with other mods. If any Mod does not work, let me know!
